A completely empty tent bag. You need to pack something into it.

<font color="#55ff55">Press </font><font color="#ff5555">P</font><font color="#55ff55"> to enable the preview of the captured area</font>

<font color="#55ff55">Press </font><font color="#ff5555">B</font><font color="#55ff55"> to disable the hologram</font>
